title: [Sacramento, CA]
prompt_preview:

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Automated decision-making systems (ADS) increasingly influence decisions in housing, employment, and lending.",
    "Research highlights the real-world consequences of algorithmic bias across industries.",
    "An estimated 99% of Fortune 500 companies use automated systems in hiring.",
    "Past cases reveal how automated systems can reinforce discrimination.",
    "A study published in Science revealed racial bias in a clinical algorithm used across hospitals to determine patient care.",
    "The clinical algorithm relied on healthcare spending as a proxy for health needs, falsely concluding that Black patients were healthier than equally sick white patients.",
    "As a result of bias in the clinical algorithm, Black patients were denied access to high-risk care.",
    "Black patients often spend less on health care due to systemic disparities, contributing to biases in treatment.",
    "An algorithm designed to determine the number of in-home care hours for residents with disabilities in Arkansas received criticism for making drastic cuts to essential aid.",
    "Some residents reported extreme disruptions to their lives, including hospitalization, due to sudden reductions from the algorithm.",
    "A lawsuit revealed that errors in the algorithm assessing medical needs of people with certain disabilities were directly responsible for inappropriate cuts.",
    "Algorithms are shaping critical aspects of our lives, from the jobs we get to the housing we can access.",
    "Without proper safeguards, automated systems can create invisible barriers that shut people out of opportunities.",
    "Automated decision-making technology can have huge benefits to workers and communities, but outcomes vary greatly with little to no engagement from users.",
    "Bad technology can result in delays or loss of crucial safety net services.",
    "Worker input can make a difference in the successful utilization of automated decision-making systems.",
    "Sunshine and accountability are crucial to ensuring best practices for technology incorporation into workplaces and democracy.",
    "Some tech companies have been resistant to common-sense regulation to protect vulnerable communities.",
    "The coalition aims to deliver meaningful guardrails to automated decision systems."
  ]
}
```
